states.name: created
states.description: Attempt identity, number, nonce and intended execution context are allocated.
entry_requirements: Parent Operation exists and permits a new Attempt.

states.name: dispatched
states.description: Attempt was sent/routed to a producer under fixed generations and epoch.

states.name: accepted
states.description: Producer accepted the Attempt for execution.

states.name: executing
states.description: Producer reports active execution or runtime evidence confirms work is in progress.
entry_requirements: Execution evidence is current and correlated.

states.name: waiting
states.description: Attempt remains current but waits inside the physical execution path.

states.name: completed
states.description: Producer reports the physical Attempt completed; Operation proof remains separately evaluated.
entry_requirements: Completion Receipt is current and correlated.

states.name: failed
states.description: Producer/Node/Provider reports terminal physical Attempt failure.

states.name: timed_out
states.description: Attempt exceeded a declared deadline and effect may require reconciliation.
entry_requirements: Timeout authority and uncertainty are retained.

states.name: cancelled
states.description: Attempt cancellation reached the provider's declared physical boundary.

states.name: abandoned
states.description: Current control cannot continue observing/controlling the Attempt and it is no longer selected, while effect certainty remains recorded.
entry_requirements: Abandonment and reconciliation reason are retained.

states.name: superseded
states.description: Another Attempt became the selected physical try after policy allowed replacement.

required_preconditions: Parent Operation permits a new Attempt and nonce/generations are allocated.
Current route, Provider generation and connection epoch are valid.
Producer acceptance Receipt matches Attempt and nonce.
Current runtime evidence matches generations and epoch.
Attempt remains current and structured wait reason is retained.
Current correlated producer completion Receipt exists.
Declared deadline elapsed and timeout policy was evaluated.
Attempt cannot remain selected and uncertainty is retained for reconciliation.
Retry/idempotency policy permits a replacement Attempt and superseding reference exists.
